and I was getting to know and learn that somebody<|20.78|> <|20.78|> on the search committee, so it was basically her vote among a few others if I would get<|25.32|> <|25.32|> the job, was a these words before,<|20.30|> <|21.20|> the brighter the light, the darker the shadow.<|23.72|> <|25.84|> Wow.<|26.30|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> Now, I had never heard that
